## Summary

- What page or site change does this PR add?

## Submission Checklist

- [ ] I added a unique directory under `submissions/<slug>/`
- [ ] I included `manifest.json`
- [ ] I included `page.md`
- [ ] I included the cover image referenced by `manifest.json`
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate:submissions`
- [ ] I confirmed the page renders in the local preview

## Notes

- Anything reviewers should know about the page, dependencies, or rendering quirks?
